title: Red Route Control
notes: Connects D3 Red Concord Checkpoint to future east Red Concord road-control territory.
Red Route Control layer with route-control tower, signal gate, scanner lanes, dispatch room, seizure cage, relay banks, and road-law barricades.
Designed for Civic Patrol cruisers, blockade cars, custody vans, and Astro Van pressure/scanner gameplay.
Ground items render below Donny/NPC bodies.
